---
title: "Argelaguet: single-cell windows SCE"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
    code_download: true
    number_sections: true
    df_print: default
    theme: lumen
---

```{r logging_early, include = FALSE}
log <- file(snakemake@log$log, open = "wt")
sink(log)
sink(log, type = "message")
```

```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(BiocParallel)
  library(SingleCellExperiment)
  library(SummarizedExperiment)
})

source("src/ggtheme.R")
source("src/windows_sce_utils.R")

param <- MulticoreParam(workers = snakemake@threads)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = TRUE,
  warning = TRUE,
  cache = FALSE,
  fig.path = "argelaguet_windows_plots/"
)
```

```{r save_snmk_debug, include = FALSE}
saveRDS(snakemake, file = "snmk_argelaguet_windows.rds", compress = "xz")
```

```{r load_meta}
meta_raw <- read_tsv(snakemake@input[["meta"]], show_col_types = FALSE)
meta_raw$cell_id <- sub("\\.gz$", "", basename(meta_raw$id_met))
rownames(meta_raw) <- meta_raw$cell_id

cat("Cells in metadata:", nrow(meta_raw), "\n")
cat("Stages:", paste(sort(unique(meta_raw$stage)), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Lineages:", length(unique(meta_raw$lineage10x)), "\n")
```

```{r build_sce}
sce <- build_windows_sce(
  assay_paths = list(
    sampen = snakemake@input[["det"]],
    adjS   = snakemake@input[["norm_det"]],
    meth   = snakemake@input[["meth"]]
  ),
  col_data = meta_raw
)

cat("SCE dimensions:", nrow(sce), "windows x", ncol(sce), "cells\n")
cat("Assays:", paste(assayNames(sce), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Stages in SCE:\n")
print(table(colData(sce)$stage, useNA = "ifany"))
cat("Lineages in SCE:\n")
print(table(colData(sce)$lineage10x, useNA = "ifany"))

saveRDS(sce, file = "sce_windows_argelaguet.rds", compress = "xz")
```

```{r filter_na}
na_frac <- rowMeans(is.na(assay(sce, "sampen")))
sce <- sce[na_frac < 0.3, ]
cat("Windows after NA filter (< 30% missing cells):", nrow(sce), "\n")
```

```{r meth_correction}
sce <- add_meth_correction(sce, BPPARAM = param)
cat("Added sampen_corrected assay via per-window sampen ~ meth + I(meth^2)\n")
cat("Final assays:", paste(assayNames(sce), collapse = ", "), "\n")
```

# QC

```{r cell_qc_df}
cell_df <- data.frame(
  stage   = colData(sce)$stage,
  lineage = colData(sce)$lineage10x,
  mean_sampen   = colMeans(assay(sce, "sampen"), na.rm = TRUE),
  mean_adjS     = colMeans(assay(sce, "adjS"), na.rm = TRUE),
  mean_corrected = colMeans(assay(sce, "sampen_corrected"), na.rm = TRUE),
  mean_meth     = colMeans(assay(sce, "meth"), na.rm = TRUE)
)
```

```{r sampen_by_stage, fig.width = ng_fig_size(4, 1)$w, fig.height = ng_fig_size(4, 1)$h}
ggplot(cell_df, aes(x = stage, y = mean_sampen, fill = stage)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, scale = "width") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, outlier.size = 0.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_ng(base_size = 8) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(y = "mean S", title = "Per-cell mean S by stage")
```

```{r adjS_by_stage, fig.width = ng_fig_size(4, 1)$w, fig.height = ng_fig_size(4, 1)$h}
ggplot(cell_df, aes(x = stage, y = mean_corrected, fill = stage)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, scale = "width") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, outlier.size = 0.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_ng(base_size = 8) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(y = "mean sampen_corrected", title = "Per-cell mean sampen_corrected by stage")
```

```{r meth_vs_sampen, fig.width = ng_fig_size(4, 1)$w, fig.height = ng_fig_size(4, 1)$h}
ggplot(cell_df, aes(x = mean_meth, y = mean_sampen, color = stage)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("E4.5" = "#440154", "E5.5" = "#31688e",
                                "E6.5" = "#35b779", "E7.5" = "#fde725")) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 2, alpha = 1))) +
  theme_ng(base_size = 8) +
  labs(x = "mean methylation", y = "mean S",
       title = "Global S vs methylation per cell")
```

```{r save_corrected}
saveRDS(sce, file = snakemake@params$corrected_sce, compress = "xz")
cat("Saved corrected SCE to:", snakemake@params$corrected_sce, "\n")
cat("Dimensions:", nrow(sce), "x", ncol(sce), "\n")
```

```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```
